items.title: Wells Fargo Lowers Honeywell (HON) Target, Cites Near-Term Market Uncertainty
items.description: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) is one of the best battery tech stocks to buy right now. Wells Fargo has kept a Hold rating on Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON). On August 1, the analyst Joseph O’Dea lowered the price target from $240 to $230. Wells Fargo remains cautious about the company’s near-term prospects. Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) […]
